title: AN ACT INCREASING THE MEMBERSHIP OF THE NATIONAL ECONOMIC COUNCIL BY INCLUDING THE SECRETARY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY AND GRANTING THE MINORITY PARTY REPRESENTATION IN THE MEMBERSHIP OF THE NATIONAL ECONOMIC COUNCIL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REORGANIZATION PLAN NUMBERED TEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4774 / 57 OG No. 1, 11 (January 2, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2699, June 18, 1960 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE MEMBERSHIP OF THE NATIONAL ECONOMIC COUNCIL BY INCLUDING THE SECRETARY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY AND GRANTING THE MINORITY PARTY REPRESENTATION IN THE MEMBERSHIP OF THE NATIONAL ECONOMIC COUNCIL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REORGANIZATION PLAN NUMBERED TEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:
